meta.title: "Spaceships. For Earth." Tesla Commercial 2017 #projectloveday
meta.description:
Show your support through Patreon - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut 

Check out the Everyday Astronaut web store! - https://everydayastronaut.com/shop

Our submission for Tesla's Project Loveday commercial contest.

Story, Directed, co-edited and music by Tim Dodd (www.timdoddphotography.com)
Director of Photography, co-edited and music by Neal Johnson (www.johnsonscreative.com)

Aerial by Rotor Visual (https://www.facebook.com/rotorvisual/)
